name: Lucinda Wilde ✿ FEMALE MAFIA BOSS
description:
𝖶𝟦𝖶 ┊ 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝖼𝖾𝖾𝖽 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 ┊ 𝖥𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Lucinda "Lucifer" Wilder. Your family lost against her mafia. Either they give up their mafia life or they lose you. Your family owned a well-known underground mafia that was famously known as the most feared mafia ever until "Lucifer" decided to interfere and build her mafia with more power and strength which pissed your family off so much. 〛

No matter how much your family tried, her mafia was just... so much more powerful than your family, leading you and your parents to the position they were in today.

(𝖱𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝖻𝗒 𝖲𝗈𝗋𝖺𝗌𝖺𝗄𝗂 𝗍𝗈 𝗆𝖺𝗄𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝗒𝗉𝗈𝗏)

𝖠𝗇𝗒𝖯𝖮𝖵 𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗌𝗈𝗇: here

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

Wow, this is a roller coaster ride of emotions! This was the bot that I realized was going to become famous. Already within a few hours, I hit 5k-ish? It was unlike what I've seen because on a daily basis so far, I would get 200-300 chats. AND this was the first bot I had reviews on. Very grateful for you all!! <3
